title: THERAPEUTIC CLASSROOM AND RELIEF NURSERY SERVICES - 211info
text: A FAMILY PLACE NEWBERG THERAPEUTIC CLASSROOM AND RELIEF NURSERY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parent education/skills classes, postpartum depression evaluation and support, home visits to new parents or parents experiencing stress, therapeutic classes for children, and referrals to child care providers. 600 E 6th Street Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-5 who are experiencing stress and want additional support Hours: Office: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-4:30pm Family Visits: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Therapeutic classes for ages 3-5: Monday/Tuesday 9am-noon Therapeutic classes for ages 24-42 months: Wednesday/Thursday 9am-noon Email (971) 241-9258 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 241-9258 Bilingual Enrollment Specialist Marisela Huizar Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. All families complete an eligibility screening. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at Edwards Elementary School in a detached building Services: Child Care Provider Referrals Children's In Home Respite Care * Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Home Based Parenting Education Parenting Skills Classes Perinatal Mood and Anxiety Disorders Treatment Preschools Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING EDUCATION GROUPS MATERIAL GOODS - CLOTHING AND DIAPER BANK If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. A FAMILY PLACE NEWBERG
